policy.defaultImportRule: Only sources declared as default_import may load when the import request omits `sources`.
policy.explicitImportRule: Explicit import requests may include only default_import and explicit_import_only sources.
policy.blockedRule: Blocked sources must return `source_blocked` and reference-only packs must never enter the import lane.

sources.note: Default import source for live specialist packs.
Allowed only by explicit request as a bounded context-operator import lane.
Blocked until the Forge-owned AO pack has a runnable CLI artifact.
Allowed only by explicit request as a bounded workflow operator import lane.
Allowed only by explicit request as a bounded design-review skill import lane.
Default import source for the live bounded skill-lifecycle lane.
Reference-only Architecture carryover; not importable as a Forge pack.
Reference-only bootstrap sample; not importable as a Forge pack.
